## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior and why this change is needed.

## Verification

List the exact commands, automated tests, and manual scenarios used to verify the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no unrelated generated or local files.
- [ ] Tests cover new behavior or explain why coverage is not applicable.
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run type-check`, and relevant tests pass locally.
- [ ] Documentation and examples are updated for user-visible changes.
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, private object names, or sensitive logs are included.
- [ ] Storage-format, authentication, network-exposure, and compatibility impacts were considered.

## Security and compatibility

Describe any security, migration, S3-compatibility, or breaking-change implications. Write “None” when there are none.
